mapper.select: SELECT id, feature_code, feature_name, sort_no FROM pq_feature WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, feature_code, feature_name, sort_no, status, created_at, updated_at FROM pq_feature ORDER BY status DESC, sort_no ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, feature_code, feature_name, sort_no, status, created_at, updated_at FROM pq_feature WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pq_feature ( feature_code, feature_name, sort_no, status ) VALUES ( #{featureCode}, #{featureName}, #{sortNo}, #{status} )
